description_long: This is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet with a dark wood or laminate finish and a modern, minimalist design. The front features two large doors with subtle vertical handles, and above them is a single wide drawer with two small round knobs. The sides and top are finished in a matching dark material, giving the cabinet a cohesive and professional appearance. The cabinet stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and designed for storing files or office supplies, with ample internal space likely divided by shelves or compartments. The understated design makes it suitable for contemporary office or urban environments.
description: A tall, dark wood or laminate filing cabinet with two front doors and a single wide drawer above, featuring minimalist handles and a modern, professional look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large light-colored doors with vertical handles, framed by a dark border.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, dark surface with no visible handles or features.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view showing a wide drawer with two round knobs above two doors, all in a dark finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain, dark surface and no visible features.
